objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access to sensor bay, mission payload bay, battery CG rail, spar datum, elevon hinges, propulsion-display module, and replaceable skid pads.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if mission payload service, CG adjustment, spar datum, or control-surface service access is blocked.

constraint: spar center datum and anti-rotation keys remain visible

trade_off.gain: reduces spar alignment operations and makes the long-range wing datum easier to inspect
trade_off.guardrail: spar center datum and anti-rotation keys remain visible
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if mission payload service, CG adjustment, spar datum, or control-surface service access is blocked.

decision.rationale: integrate center spine with spar sockets and wing-root keys

verification.check: spar center datum and anti-rotation keys remain visible

evolution.leaves_for_next: spar center datum and anti-rotation keys remain visible | mit: Keep sensor nose, payload insert, and battery CG rail as removable service modules.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access to sensor bay, mission payload bay, battery CG rail, spar datum, elevon hinges, propulsion-display module, and replaceable skid pads.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if mission payload service, CG adjustment, spar datum, or control-surface service access is blocked.

constraint: clear sensor window and boom socket remain external

trade_off.gain: sensor bay and boom can be inspected or replaced after handling damage
trade_off.guardrail: clear sensor window and boom socket remain external
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if mission payload service, CG adjustment, spar datum, or control-surface service access is blocked.

decision.rationale: keep sensor nose as a removable service module

verification.check: clear sensor window and boom socket remain external

evolution.leaves_for_next: clear sensor window and boom socket remain external | mit: Use visible CG marks and a slide-in rail with clearance test.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access to sensor bay, mission payload bay, battery CG rail, spar datum, elevon hinges, propulsion-display module, and replaceable skid pads.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if mission payload service, CG adjustment, spar datum, or control-surface service access is blocked.

constraint: payload insert and battery dummy can be removed independently

trade_off.gain: teaches mission payload and energy placement relationship with fewer loose trays
trade_off.guardrail: payload insert and battery dummy can be removed independently
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if mission payload service, CG adjustment, spar datum, or control-surface service access is blocked.

decision.rationale: combine mission payload tray with battery CG rail but keep both slide-in

verification.check: payload insert and battery dummy can be removed independently

evolution.leaves_for_next: payload insert and battery dummy can be removed independently | mit: Expose spar socket datum and anti-rotation keys.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access to sensor bay, mission payload bay, battery CG rail, spar datum, elevon hinges, propulsion-display module, and replaceable skid pads.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if mission payload service, CG adjustment, spar datum, or control-surface service access is blocked.

trade_off.gain: rear service and cable routing remain teachable without creating flight hardware
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if mission payload service, CG adjustment, spar datum, or control-surface service access is blocked.

decision.rationale: keep rear propulsion display as a separate non-functional module

evolution.leaves_for_next: module is labeled display-only | mit: Keep elevon hinge covers and rear display module replaceable.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access to sensor bay, mission payload bay, battery CG rail, spar datum, elevon hinges, propulsion-display module, and replaceable skid pads.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if mission payload service, CG adjustment, spar datum, or control-surface service access is blocked.

constraint: hinge covers and skid sockets stay accessible

trade_off.gain: fragile control and ground-contact features remain serviceable
trade_off.guardrail: hinge covers and skid sockets stay accessible
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if mission payload service, CG adjustment, spar datum, or control-surface service access is blocked.

decision.rationale: keep elevon hinges and skid pads replaceable

verification.check: hinge covers and skid sockets stay accessible

evolution.leaves_for_next: hinge covers and skid sockets stay accessible | mit: Label the bay as non-weapon mission payload and exclude operational or weapon details.
